title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
